title: Funding
doc_html:
§1495. Funding

            To achieve the purposes of this Part, the commissioner may accept and expend monies from any source, including gifts, contributions, donations, state appropriations, and federal grants, and may accept and use services from individuals, corporations, and governmental entities.

            Acts 2022, No. 462, §1.
doc_text:
§1495.  Funding
To achieve the purposes of this Part, the commissioner may accept and expend
monies from any source, including gifts, contributions, donations, state appropriations, and
federal grants, and may accept and use services from individuals, corporations, and
governmental entities.
Acts 2022, No. 462, §1.
